violations.description: cleanupTestData() in beforeEach/afterEach operates on ALL test data - tests may interfere
violations.suggestion: Each test should create and cleanup its own scoped test data

violations.description: Tests modify global console with spies - potential leakage
violations.suggestion: Use vi.clearAllMocks() in afterEach to ensure cleanup

violations.description: beforeEach creates console spy - potential state sharing
violations.suggestion: Ensure afterEach properly restores all mocks

violations.description: Test modifies NODE_ENV without proper restoration

recommendations: Use vi.stubEnv() instead of direct process.env mutation for auto-cleanup
Ensure vi.clearAllMocks() is called in afterEach blocks
Scope cleanupTestData() to test-specific data instead of global cleanup
Consider test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' }) to enforce isolation
summary: Tests are well isolated with 4 violations (0 HIGH). Good use of beforeEach/afterEach for cleanup.
